name: Unstoppable Sports Zone
about: Unstoppable Sports Zone offers a year-round indoor golf simulator experience in Beaverton, Michigan. The venue provides a realistic environment for golfers to practice their swing, play on famous courses, or enjoy a round with friends, accessible rain or shine. It operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with pricing structured at $25 per hour for Monday-Thursday and $40 per hour for Friday-Sunday, offering flexibility for booking multiple hours at a time. The facility caters to various activities, from individual practice sessions to large group events, parties, and corporate outings, making it a versatile destination for golfers of all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf regardless of weather
BYOB policy for beverages and snacks
Custom packages available for group events

food_and_drink.notes: Customers can bring their own snacks or order delivery from a local restaurant during business hours.
BYOB policy allows customers to bring their own beverages.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own beverages and snacks of your choice. You can also order delivery from a local restaurant during business hours.

faq.question: How much time should I allow for an 18-hole round?
faq.answer: The venue recommends allowing at least a 4-hour block for 4 adults to complete an 18-hole course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Unstoppable Sports Zone is a family-friendly venue suitable for kids.
